# Fixture Notes

This fixture covers SEO effectiveness work for an existing product surface.

The skill should produce an SEO effectiveness audit and prioritized backlog, while keeping private analytics safe and using no fabricated rankings, traffic, search volume, crawl data, or Search Console data.

When SEO growth is claimed or targeted, the skill must use SEO_GROWTH_GUARANTEE_GATE.md to record baseline metric, target metric, measurement source, attribution window, implemented changes, exclusion factors, result decision, and next iteration.
